landing.subtitle: Transform any topic into an immersive, multi-agent interactive learning experience. Upload a PDF or describe your content — AI does the rest.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Powered by the latest AI models, built natively for interactive education.

feature.aiGenerationDesc: Upload a PDF or describe your topic — AI generates immersive, multi-scene interactive courseware in seconds.
feature.multiLangDesc: Generate courseware in Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, French, and many more languages with auto TTS.
feature.interactiveDesc: Quizzes, PBL projects, whiteboard, and multi-agent discussion — a fully immersive learning experience.
feature.ttsDesc: Natural voice narration for every slide with speech recognition for voice-driven interaction.
feature.shareDesc: Share courseware via link — read-only for anyone or editable copies for collaborators.
feature.playbackDesc: Present your courseware with smooth animations, agent roundtable discussions, and auto-play.

landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of educators leveraging {{brand}} to build deeply engaging interactive courseware.

toolbar.languageHint: Course will be generated in this language
toolbar.outlineConfirmOn: Pause for me to review the outline
toolbar.outlineConfirmOff: Click to pause after outline generation for review
toolbar.parallelOnTooltip: Parallel generation ON: scenes generate concurrently in batches for ~3× speedup. Pros: real speech continuity preserved across batches. Cons: scenes 2-3 within the same batch don't reference each other's lines; upstream LLM/TTS pressure increases ~K× and rate-limited scenes will land in the failed list for one-click retry. Click to restore sequential generation.
toolbar.parallelOffTooltip: Sequential generation (default): scenes are generated one by one with fully continuous speech context. Click to enable parallel mode for ~2-3× speedup at the cost of some intra-batch continuity.
toolbar.webSearchDesc: Search the web for up-to-date information before generation
toolbar.webSearchNoProvider: Configure search API key in Settings
toolbar.configureProviderHint: Configure at least one model provider to generate courses
toolbar.ttsHint: Choose a voice for the AI teacher
toolbar.lectureModeTooltip: Lecture/auto mode: lecture mode hides the central play button and mutes AI narration so the teacher can present

chat.startConversation: Type a message below to begin chatting

lectureNotes.empty: Notes will appear here after lecture playback
lectureNotes.emptyHint: Press play to start the lecture

agentBar.smartModeDesc: The system will automatically match the most suitable combination of assistants and study buddies based on the course content.

stage.confirmSwitchMessage: A topic is currently in progress. Switching scenes will end the current topic. Are you sure?
stage.generatingNextPage: Scene is being generated, please wait...
stage.confirmDeleteScene: Delete scene "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
stage.editSourceHint: Edit the raw JSON of this scene. Changes stay local until you save.
stage.retryModeHint: Re-run this page as-is, without changing any prompts (text, media, and TTS are all produced again).
stage.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this page should cover…
stage.keyPointsPlaceholder: Enter one key point per line
stage.mediaPromptsHint: Adjust the prompt for each image or video
stage.ownerOnly: Visible only to the classroom owner

whiteboard.title: Interactive Whiteboard
whiteboard.readyHint: Elements will appear here when added by AI

quiz.title: Quiz
quiz.subtitle: Test your knowledge
quiz.gradingFallback: Grading service unavailable. Base score given.

roundtable.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected, please try again

pbl.legacyFormat: This PBL scene uses a legacy format. Please regenerate the course.
pbl.emptyProject: PBL project has not been generated yet. Please create via course generation.

roleSelection.title: Choose Your Role
roleSelection.description: Select a role to start collaborating on the project

chat.title: Project Discussion
chat.mentionHint: Use @question to ask, @judge to submit for review
chat.welcomeMessage:
Hello! I'm your Question Agent for this issue: "{{title}}"

To help guide your work, I've prepared some questions for you:

{{questions}}

Feel free to @question me anytime if you need help or clarification!
chat.issueCompleteMessage: Issue "{{completed}}" completed! Moving to next issue: "{{next}}"
chat.allCompleteMessage: 🎉 All issues completed! Great work on the project!

step1.title: Step 1: Choose a Role
step1.desc: After the project is generated, select a role from the list (non-system roles marked with 🟢)

step2.title: Step 2: Complete Issues
step2.desc: Each issue represents a learning task:

s1.title: View current Issue
s1.desc: Check the issue's title, description, and assignee

s2.title: Get guidance
s2.example:
@question Where should I start?
@question How do I implement this feature?
s2.desc: The Question Agent provides guiding questions and hints (no direct answers)

s3.title: Submit your work
s3.example: @judge I'm done, please check my Notes
s3.desc: The Judge Agent evaluates your work and gives feedback:
s3.complete: Automatically moves to the next issue

step3.title: Step 3: Complete the Project
step3.desc: When all issues are done, the system displays "🎉 Project Complete!"

share.title: Share & Collaborate
share.modePublicDesc: Anyone with the link can view
share.modeReadonlyDesc: Recipients must sign in before they can view this classroom
share.modeEditableDesc: Recipients must sign in; once signed in they can save a copy to their own classrooms
share.modeSsoDesc: Only members of your organization can view
share.persistentHint: Each classroom keeps a single persistent link per author. After editing, click "Push latest now" to sync changes to all viewers.
share.pushSuccessClean: Share is up to date — all media in sync
share.pushExplanation: "Push latest now" first syncs your current edits to the cloud, then re-uploads any missing speech audio or images.
share.lectureModeDesc: When on, viewers open the share in lecture mode: the central play button is hidden and AI narration is muted so the teacher can present.

viewer.bannerPublicHint: Anyone with this link can view. Sign in if you need account-only features.
viewer.bannerReadonlyHint: Sign in with your account to open this classroom.
viewer.bannerEditableTitle: Shared classroom — you can copy it
viewer.bannerEditableHint: Sign in, then save a copy under My Classrooms to edit, teach from your own link, or keep a backup.
viewer.bannerSsoHint: Only members signed in through your organization can access this link.
viewer.lectureAsAutoTooltip: Switch to auto-play on this device only (does not change the author’s file)
viewer.lectureAsLectureTooltip: Switch back to lecture mode on this device only

addScene.title: Add a new page
addScene.typeSlideDesc: AI teacher walks through a topic
addScene.typeQuizDesc: A few questions to check understanding
addScene.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this page should teach in a sentence or two
addScene.keyPointPlaceholder: A core idea this page should cover
addScene.interactiveDesignIdeaPlaceholder: Any UX or visualisation idea (leave blank to let AI decide)
addScene.aiHint: After submit, AI will draft the content first, then generate actions and speech. You can keep editing other pages while it runs.
addScene.success: New page added to the classroom
addScene.typeLocked: Your role is not allowed to create this scene type — contact an admin to request access
addScene.typeForbidden: Your role is not allowed to create this scene type
addScene.appendForbidden: Your role is not allowed to append a new page at the end
addScene.insertForbidden: Your role is not allowed to insert a new page in the middle
addScene.noTypesAllowed: Your role is not currently granted any add-scene type

speech.staleHint: Click to review and regenerate this line
speech.previewMissing: No audio yet — generate it first to preview

classroom.sourceLocalTooltip: Only on this browser. Sign in and re-save to push to the cloud.
classroom.sourceCloudTooltip: Only in the cloud — open it once to download to this browser.
classroom.syncDeleteWarning: Deleted locally but cloud sync failed. Please retry later.
classroom.syncRenameWarning: Renamed locally but cloud sync failed. Please retry later.
classroom.cloudListUnavailable: Cloud classroom list is unavailable — showing this browser's local classrooms only.

upload.generateFailed: Failed to generate classroom, please try again
upload.requirementPlaceholder:
Tell me anything you want to learn, e.g.
"Teach me Python from scratch in 30 minutes"
"Explain Fourier Transform on the whiteboard"
"How to play the board game Avalon"
upload.fileTooLarge: File too large. Please select a PDF file smaller than 50MB

generation.pdfLoadFailed: Failed to load PDF file, please try again
generation.generatingSlideContentDesc: Creating slides, quizzes, and interactive content...
generation.sessionNotFoundDesc: Please fill in course requirements to start the generation process.
generation.classroomReady: Your personalized AI learning environment has been generated successfully.
generation.textTruncated: Document text is long, using first {{n}} characters for generation
generation.imageTruncated: {{total}} images found, exceeding the {{max}} image limit. Extra images will use text descriptions only
generation.agentGenerationDesc: Generating roles based on course content...
generation.outlineEmptyResponse: Model returned no valid outlines. Please check model configuration and try again
generation.outlineGenerateFailed: Outline generation failed, please try again later
generation.outlineAwaitConfirmDesc: Edit, reorder, add, remove, or change scene types — or send feedback and regenerate.

outlineEditor.title: Outline Review
outlineEditor.desc: Confirm or adjust before generating the rest of the content.
outlineEditor.regenerateAllDesc: Optional feedback — leave blank for an overall improvement pass.
outlineEditor.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g. Add a hands-on example to scene 2; lower quiz difficulty…
outlineEditor.descPlaceholder: One or two sentences describing the teaching goal of this scene
outlineEditor.keyPointPlaceholder: A core takeaway for this scene
outlineEditor.changeTypeWarning: Switching the type clears this scene's type-specific config (quiz settings / interactive concept / PBL project, etc.). Continue?

validation.empty: At least one scene is required to continue.

generation.webSearchingDesc: Searching the web for up-to-date information
generation.insufficientCreditsDesc: Your credits have been used up. Please recharge before continuing to generate.
generation.processHaltedDesc: An error occurred during generation. Check the sidebar for details.
generation.readyToLaunchDesc: Your interactive classroom is ready. Redirecting you to the editor shortly.

visualizer.webSearchDesc: Gathering latest information from authoritative sources
visualizer.outlineDesc: Structuring knowledge points into a logical flow
visualizer.agentGenDesc: Configuring classroom roles, personas, and pedagogical strategies
visualizer.slideLayoutDesc: Generating rich text and structured lists
visualizer.actionsGenDesc: Orchestrating TTS, camera movements, and UI interactions

settings.title: Settings
settings.outlineConfirmEnabledDesc: When on, generation pauses after outlines stream so you can review, edit or regenerate them before slides and actions are produced. You can override this per-task on the home page.
settings.ttsModelPlaceholder: Enter or select TTS model name
settings.modelSelectedViaVoice: Model is determined by voice selection
settings.testConnectionDesc: Test current API configuration is available
settings.agentSettingsDesc: Select the agents to participate in the conversation. Select 1 for single agent mode, select multiple for multi-agent collaborative mode.
settings.agentModeAutoDesc: AI will automatically generate appropriate roles
settings.autoAgentCountDesc: Number of agents to auto-generate (including teacher)
settings.maxTurnsDesc: The maximum number of discussion turns between agents (each agent completes actions and reply counts as one turn)

agentDescriptions.default-1: Lead teacher with clear and structured explanations
agentDescriptions.default-2: Supports learning and helps clarify key points
agentDescriptions.default-3: Brings humor and energy to the classroom
agentDescriptions.default-4: Always curious, loves asking why and how
agentDescriptions.default-5: Diligently records and organizes class notes
agentDescriptions.default-6: Thinks deeply and explores the essence of topics

settings.addProviderDescription: Add custom model providers to extend available AI models
settings.profileSectionHint: Update your nickname, avatar and bio. Your nickname is used by AI agents when addressing you.
settings.agentNamePresetsHint: Renames here apply globally. A specific classroom can still override these names.
settings.deleteProviderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
settings.resetToDefaultDescription: Restore model list to default configuration (API key and Base URL will be preserved)
settings.resetConfirmDescription: This will remove all custom models and restore the built-in default model list. API key and Base URL will be preserved.
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save settings, please try again
settings.modelsManagementDescription: Manage models for this provider. To select the active model, go to "General".
settings.step1ConfigureProvider: Go to "Model Providers", select or add a provider, and configure connection settings (API key, Base URL, etc.)
settings.step2SelectModel: Select the model you want to use in "Active Model" below
settings.step3StartUsing: After saving, the system will use your selected model
settings.activeModelDescription: Select the model for AI conversations and content generation
settings.configureProvidersFirst: Please configure provider connection settings in "Model Providers" on the left
settings.asrDescription: ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) - Convert speech to text
settings.ttsEnabledDescription: When enabled, speech audio will be generated during course creation
settings.ttsVoiceConfigHint: Per-agent voice can be configured in "Classroom Role Config" on the homepage
settings.asrEnabledDescription: When enabled, students can use microphone for voice input
settings.browserNativeNote: Browser Native ASR requires no configuration and is completely free
settings.browserNativeTTSNote: Browser Native TTS requires no configuration and is completely free, using system built-in voices
settings.asrNotSupported: Browser does not support Speech Recognition API
settings.browserTTSNotSupported: Browser does not support Speech Synthesis API
settings.browserTTSNoVoices: Current browser has no available TTS voices
settings.asrResultPlaceholder: Recognition result will be displayed after recording
settings.ttsTestTextDefault: Hello, this is a test speech.
settings.qwenVoiceNofish: Designer who can't pronounce retroflex sounds
settings.qwenVoiceBella: Little loli who doesn't get drunk
settings.qwenVoiceMia: Gentle as spring water, well-behaved as snow
settings.qwenVoiceMochi: Smart little adult with childlike innocence
settings.qwenVoiceBellona: Loud voice, clear pronunciation, vivid characters
settings.qwenVoiceVincent: Unique hoarse voice telling tales of war and honor
settings.qwenVoiceArthur: Simple voice soaked by years and dry tobacco
settings.qwenVoiceNini: Soft and sticky voice like glutinous rice cake
settings.qwenVoiceEbona: Her whisper is like a rusty key
settings.qwenVoiceSeren: Gentle and soothing voice to help you sleep
settings.qwenVoicePip: Naughty but full of childlike innocence
settings.qwenVoiceStella: Sweet confused girl voice that becomes just when shouting
settings.qwenVoiceAlek: Cold of battle nation, warm under woolen coat
settings.qwenVoiceLenn: Rational German youth who wears suit and listens to post-punk
settings.qwenVoiceAndre: Magnetic, natural and calm male voice
settings.qwenVoiceMarcus: Broad face, short words, solid heart - old Shaanxi taste
settings.lang_th-TH: ไทย (ประเทศไทย)
settings.pdfDescription: Choose PDF parsing engine with support for text extraction, image processing, and table recognition
settings.mineruDescription: MinerU is a commercial PDF parsing service that supports advanced features such as table extraction, formula recognition, and layout analysis.
settings.mineruApiKeyRequired: You need to apply for an API Key on the MinerU website before use.
settings.mineruCostWarning: MinerU is a commercial service and may incur fees. Please check the MinerU website for pricing details.
settings.mineruLocalDescription: MinerU supports local deployment with advanced PDF parsing (tables, formulas, layout analysis). Requires deploying MinerU service first.
settings.mineruApiKeyOptional: Only required if server has authentication enabled
settings.imageGenerationDisabledHint: When enabled, images will be auto-generated during course creation
settings.imageTestPromptDefault: A cute cat sitting on a desk
settings.videoGenerationDisabledHint: When enabled, videos will be auto-generated during course creation
settings.videoTestPromptDefault: A cute cat walking on a desk
settings.videoGenerationWarning: Video generation usually takes 1-2 minutes, please be patient
settings.mediaContentSensitive: Sorry, this content triggered a safety check.
settings.noVisionWarning: Current model does not support vision. Images can still be placed in slides, but the model cannot understand image content to optimize selection and layout
settings.serverConfiguredNotice: Admin has configured an API key for this provider on the server. You can use it directly or enter your own key to override.
settings.optionalOverride: Optional — leave empty to use server config
settings.modelNotConfigured: Please select a model to get started
settings.clearCacheDescription: Delete all locally stored data, including classroom records, chat history, audio cache, and app settings. This action cannot be undone.
settings.clearCacheConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to clear all cache?
settings.clearCacheConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all of the following data and cannot be recovered:
settings.clearCacheConfirmItems: Classrooms & scenes, Chat history, Audio & image cache, App settings & preferences
settings.clearCacheSuccess: Cache cleared, page will refresh shortly
settings.clearCacheFailed: Failed to clear cache, please try again
settings.webSearchApiKeyHint: Get an API key from tavily.com for web search
settings.webSearchServerConfigured: Server-side Tavily API key is configured

profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself — the AI teacher will personalize lessons for you...
profile.avatarHint: Your avatar will appear in classroom discussions and chats

credits.unlimitedDesc: Credits tracking is not enabled (no database configured)
credits.rechargeDesc: The recharge feature is under development. You will be able to purchase credits to continue using AI-powered courseware generation, TTS, image generation, and more.

agentConfig.description: Manage AI agents in the classroom discussion
agentConfig.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agent?

editSource.speechEmpty: This page has no speech actions

menu.noPermission: You don't have permission to use this feature

agent.renameStaleHint: Already-generated speech may still mention the old name. Regenerate any individual action if needed.
agent.scopeStageDesc: Applies only to the current classroom and follows it when shared.
agent.scopeGlobalDesc: Applies globally for you across all classrooms unless a specific classroom overrides it.
